sequential.echo:
#!/bin/bash
touch local.env
docker-compose --file=${docker.compose.file.path} --project-name=${analytics.cloud.project.name} up --detach
while [[ -n $(docker ps | grep "health: starting") ]] || [[ -n $(docker ps | grep "unhealthy") ]] do echo "Waiting for docker compose to be healthy."
sleep 30 done
while [[ -z $(docker logs faro | grep "Completed demo data creation") ]] do echo "Waiting for faro to startup."
sleep 15 done
docker logs faro
docker container prune -f docker image prune -f docker volume prune -f

fail.message: Failed to start Analytics Cloud with error code ${analytics.cloud.start.result}.

catch.echo: Failed to create Analytics Cloud demo data.

sequential.execute:
docker ps
docker network ls
docker network inspect ${short.hostname}
cat build-ext.gradle
./gradlew testIntegration

docker ps -a
touch local.env
docker-compose --file=${docker.compose.file.path} --project-name=${analytics.cloud.project.name} down --volumes
docker container prune -f docker image prune -f docker volume prune -f

docker ps -a
docker-compose --file=${docker.compose.file.path} down --volumes
docker container prune -f docker image prune -f docker volume prune -f
